prompt: I have a customer support JSONL dataset (~500 examples) and I want to train a Llama 3.1 8B model on Nebius Token Factory to specialize it for my product. How do I upload the data and start a LoRA fine-tuning job?

assertions.text: Uses OpenAI client (not raw requests) for the fine-tuning API
Creates fine-tuning job with lora_rank hyperparameter
Specifies the correct base model: meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct
